text: Nina akiba kidogo kwa sababu biashara yangu ya mboga haijaenda vizuri mwezi huu, soko limekuwa dhaifu.
annotator_notes: 'Akiba' = savings; 'soko dhaifu' signals demand-side business risk, not personal failure framing.

text: I joined a chama last year lakini sasa naona ni mzigo, kila mwezi tunatakiwa kutoa elfu mbili hata kama sina.
annotator_notes: Chama framed as burden ('mzigo'); implies liquidity stress, borderline debt-like obligation.

text: My daughter alikuwa na malaria for two weeks, nilitumia savings zangu zote za shule kwa hospitali.
annotator_notes: Health shock directly depleting savings earmarked for a different purpose (school fees) - important for lending-readiness models.

text: Nimechukua mkopo wa soko (shylock) kwa sababu benki walisema sina dhamana ya kutosha.
annotator_notes: Explicit articulation of collateral barrier to formal credit; informal lender used as fallback.

text: Kuna wiki nafanya vizuri kwa biashara, wiki ingine ni hasara kabisa, hivyo siwezi kupanga akiba ya kudumu.
annotator_notes: Describes income volatility as a structural barrier to consistent saving behavior.

text: Since my husband passed away nabeba mzigo wa nyumba peke yangu - watoto, wazazi wangu wa kale, na biashara.
annotator_notes: Multiple unpaid care burdens layered with income generation; useful for care-work load classifier.

text: Table banking yetu inasaidia lakini fine za kuchelewa kulipa zinaniumiza zaidi kuliko deni lenyewe.
annotator_notes: Distinguishes chama-imposed penalty structures from the underlying obligation - nuance for annotators.

text: Nataka kuomba mkopo wa benki wa boresha biashara lakini sina statement za miezi sita, mimi huuza cash tu.
annotator_notes: Informal cash-based trading excludes her from standard bank documentation requirements.

text: Mtoto wangu mdogo ana ulemavu, natumia muda mwingi kumhudumia badala ya kuenda sokoni kuuza bidhaa.
annotator_notes: Care responsibility directly trades off against income-generating time - key barrier narrative.

text: Tuko na akiba ya chama, lakini nikijitoa sasa nitalipa faini kubwa, so niko stuck.
annotator_notes: Illustrates illiquidity of group savings - relevant to 'lending readiness' liquidity assumptions.

text: Nilikopa pesa za shule kutoka kwa jirani, sasa deni limekuwa kubwa kuliko nilivyotarajia kwa riba.
annotator_notes: Informal peer lending with compounding interest - a distinct debt subtype from bank or chama debt.

text: Biashara yangu ilikumbwa na moto mwezi jana, nimepoteza bidhaa zote na sina bima.
annotator_notes: Catastrophic uninsured business loss; no health or care-work overlap - single-label example for balance.

text: Ninaweka kidogo kidogo kwa M-Shwari kila wiki, ni akiba yangu ya dharura kama kuna ugonjwa.
annotator_notes: Mobile-money micro-savings explicitly earmarked as a health-shock buffer - important lending-signal.

text: Kama mama mboga, sipati mshahara wa kudumu hivyo sifikirii nina 'lending readiness' kama wanavyosema benki.
annotator_notes: Respondent self-references formal credit terminology skeptically - flag for explainability review.

text: Nililazimika kutoa mtoto shule kwa muda kwa sababu sikuwa na pesa ya matibabu ya mama yangu.
annotator_notes: Trade-off between education investment and urgent health/care spending.

text: Chama chetu kimenisaidia kupata mtaji wa kuanzisha kibanda changu cha nguo mitumba.
annotator_notes: Positive framing of chama as capital source - important to avoid annotating chama only as burden.

text: Sina akaunti ya benki, naogopa kukopa maana nikishindwa kulipa watachukua vitu vyangu vichache nilivyo navyo.
annotator_notes: Fear-based credit avoidance rooted in asset vulnerability, not lack of interest in borrowing.

text: Nilikuwa na duka dogo la nyanya na sukuma, lakini bei za mboga zilipanda ghafla nikashindwa kuendelea.
annotator_notes: Input-price shock affecting micro-retail viability.

text: Naishi na mama yangu mzee mwenye presha, dawa zake ni gharama ya mara kwa mara inayoshinda mapato yangu.
annotator_notes: Chronic (not acute) health shock creating recurring rather than one-off financial strain - distinct subtype worth separate tagging.

text: Nataka kujiunga na chama kipya cha uwekezaji lakini naogopa obligations za ziada kwa sasa.
annotator_notes: Prospective/anticipatory framing rather than lived experience - useful edge case for annotators.

text: Nilipata mkopo mdogo wa simu (fuliza) kulipia deni la mwezi uliopita, sasa deni linaongezeka la digital.
annotator_notes: Digital micro-loan rollover pattern; relevant to detecting debt-cycling behavior in NLP model.

text: Kazi yangu ya kuuza nguo mitumba iko sawa sasa hivi, sina wasiwasi mkubwa wa kifedha mwezi huu.
annotator_notes: Neutral/stable narrative included intentionally to balance dataset and avoid over-triggering risk categories.

text: Nimejifunza kuweka akiba kidogo kila siku baada ya mafunzo ya kifedha kutoka kwa NGO mtaani.
annotator_notes: Positive behavior change attributed to a financial literacy intervention - useful for outcome tracking.

text: Mume wangu hachangii pesa ya nyumba, mzigo wa watoto na deni la shule ni wangu peke yangu.
annotator_notes: Gendered distribution of household financial and care burden explicitly named.

text: Sijui kama nikichukua mkopo mkubwa wa benki nitaweza kulipa, biashara yangu bado ni ndogo sana.
annotator_notes: Self-assessed risk aversion tied to business scale, not creditworthiness alone.
